product: Real-time collaboration in notebook cells, files, and SQL editor
tagline: Real time collaboration is now available in notebook cells, files, and the new SQL editor.
what_it_does: Real time collaboration is now available in notebook cells, files, and the new SQL editor. Multiple users can edit the same cell simultaneously and can view each other's edits. You can share a Databricks notebook with coworkers, control access with five permission levels, edit together in real time, and leave comments on code.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: Real time collaboration is now available in notebook cells, files, and the new SQL editor. Multiple users can edit the same cell simultaneously and can view each other's edits.
key_takeaway: Real time collaboration is now available in notebook cells, files, and the new SQL editor.
